title: KANEL: Kolmogorov-Arnold Network Ensemble Learning Enables Early Hit Enrichment in High-Throughput Virtual Screening
summary: Machine learning models of chemical bioactivity are increasingly used for prioritizing a small number of compounds in virtual screening libraries for experimental follow-up. In these applications, assessing model accuracy by early hit enrichment such as Positive Predicted Value (PPV) calculated for top N hits (PPV@N) is more appropriate and actionable than traditional global metrics such as AUC. We present KANEL, an ensemble workflow that combines interpretable Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) with XGBoost, random forest, and multilayer perceptron models trained on complementary molecular representations (LillyMol descriptors, RDKit-derived descriptors, and Morgan fingerprints).

AI.tldr: KANEL是一个集成工作流，结合可解释的Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks与XGBoost、随机森林和多层感知器模型，用于化学生物活性预测，重点关注早期命中富集评估。
AI.motivation: 在虚拟筛选中，评估模型准确性的传统全局指标（如AUC）不如针对前N个命中计算的早期命中富集指标（如PPV@N）更合适和可操作。需要开发能够提供更好早期命中预测性能的模型。
AI.method: 提出KANEL集成工作流，结合可解释的Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks（KANs）与XGBoost、随机森林和多层感知器模型，使用互补的分子表示（LillyMol描述符、RDKit衍生描述符和Morgan指纹）进行训练。
AI.result: 论文没有提供具体实验结果，但暗示该方法能够提供更好的早期命中富集性能，比传统全局指标更适合虚拟筛选应用。
AI.conclusion: KANEL集成工作流通过结合多种模型和分子表示，能够提供更准确和可操作的早期命中富集评估，适用于虚拟筛选中的化合物优先级排序。

title: A Priori Sampling of Transition States with Guided Diffusion
summary: Transition states, the first-order saddle points on the potential energy surfaces, govern the kinetics and mechanisms of chemical reactions and conformational changes. Locating them is challenging because transition pathways are topologically complex and can proceed via an ensemble of diverse routes. Existing methods address these challenges by introducing heuristic assumptions about the pathway or reaction coordinates, which limits their applicability when a good initial guess is unavailable or when the guess precludes alternative, potentially relevant pathways. We propose to bypass such heuristic limitations by introducing ASTRA, A Priori Sampling of TRAnsition States with Guided Diffusion, which reframes the transition state search as an inference-time scaling problem for generative models. ASTRA trains a score-based diffusion model on configurations from known metastable states. Then, ASTRA guides inference toward the isodensity surface separating the basins of metastable states via a principled composition of conditional scores. A Score-Aligned Ascent (SAA) process then approximates a reaction coordinate from the difference between conditioned scores and combines it with physical forces to drive convergence onto first-order transition states. Validated on benchmarks from 2D potentials to biomolecular conformational changes and chemical reaction, ASTRA locates transition states with high precision and discovers multiple reaction pathways, enabling mechanistic studies of complex molecular systems.

AI.tldr: ASTRA是一种基于扩散模型的过渡态搜索方法，通过引导扩散和分数对齐上升过程，无需启发式假设即可精确定位化学反应的过渡态并发现多条反应路径。
AI.motivation: 过渡态搜索面临挑战，因为反应路径拓扑复杂且存在多种可能途径。现有方法依赖启发式假设和反应坐标初始猜测，限制了应用范围，特别是在缺乏良好初始猜测或需要探索替代路径时。
AI.method: ASTRA训练基于已知亚稳态构型的分数扩散模型，通过条件分数的原则性组合引导推理到亚稳态盆地之间的等密度表面。采用分数对齐上升过程从条件分数差异中近似反应坐标，并结合物理力驱动收敛到一阶过渡态。
AI.result: 在从2D势能到生物分子构象变化和化学反应的基准测试中，ASTRA能够高精度定位过渡态，并发现多条反应路径，为复杂分子系统的机理研究提供了可能。
AI.conclusion: ASTRA通过将过渡态搜索重新定义为生成模型的推理时间缩放问题，克服了传统方法的启发式限制，为复杂分子系统的过渡态搜索和机理研究提供了强大工具。

title: Liquid structure adjacent to solid surfaces follows the superposition principle
summary: Liquid structure at solid-liquid interfaces is critical for many natural and engineered processes ranging from biological signal transduction to electrochemical energy conversion. Advanced experimental and computational methods have provided insights into the structure of liquids adjacent to planar substrates at the nanoscale. However, realistic solid-liquid interfaces are inevitably inhomogeneous across multiple length scales, presenting a complexity that surpasses the capabilities of existing approaches. Here we bridge the complexity gap by discovering and utilizing a hitherto hidden principle of interfacial liquid--superposition. Experimentally, we use 3D atomic force microscopy (3D-AFM) to image the interfacial structure of a wide range of organic and aqueous solvents and electrolytes, uncovering universal liquid density oscillations and emergent liquid layer reconfigurations at heterogeneous substrate sites. We further develop an analytical model, coined solid-liquid superposition (SLS), which solves the interfacial liquid density distribution based on a key descriptor: the effective total correlation function (ETCF) between a liquid molecule and nearby solid atoms. SLS not only explains all the experimentally observed interfacial liquid distribution profiles from the angstrom to near-micron scale, but also predicts more precise atomic-scale interference patterns which are further corroborated by molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. This study unveils a key structural descriptor of interfacial liquids, and establishes a theoretical framework for rapidly and accurately predicting liquid structures adjacent to solid surfaces with arbitrary morphology and size scale.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现了固液界面液体结构的叠加原理，通过3D原子力显微镜实验和固体-液体叠加(SLS)模型，揭示了从埃到近微米尺度的界面液体分布规律。
AI.motivation: 现实中的固液界面在多个长度尺度上具有不均匀性，这种复杂性超出了现有方法的分析能力。需要开发新方法来理解复杂界面上的液体结构，这对生物信号传导、电化学能量转换等过程至关重要。
AI.method: 1. 使用3D原子力显微镜(3D-AFM)成像多种有机/水溶剂和电解质的界面结构；2. 开发固体-液体叠加(SLS)分析模型，基于关键描述符——液体分子与附近固体原子间的有效总相关函数(ETCF)；3. 结合分子动力学模拟验证预测结果。
AI.result: 1. 实验发现普遍存在的液体密度振荡和异质基底位点处液体层的重构现象；2. SLS模型成功解释了从埃到近微米尺度的所有实验观测界面液体分布；3. 模型预测的原子尺度干涉图案得到分子动力学模拟进一步证实。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了界面液体的关键结构描述符，建立了能够快速准确预测任意形态和尺寸固体表面附近液体结构的理论框架，为理解复杂固液界面提供了新工具。

title: Geometric Phase Effect in Thermodynamic Properties and in the Imaginary-Time Multi-Electronic-State Path Integral Formulation
summary: The geometric phase (GP) is a fundamental quantum effect arising from conical intersections (CIs), with profound consequences for vibronic energy levels. Standard imaginary-time path integral molecular dynamics (PIMD) based on the Born-Oppenheimer approximation does not account for the GP, potentially leading to significant errors in low-temperature thermodynamic properties. In this Perspective, we demonstrate that the multi-electronic-state path integral (MES-PI) formulation in imaginary time (developed in J. Chem. Phys. 2018, 148, 102319) naturally captures the GP effect through the electronic trace of the product of statistically weighted overlap matrices between successive imaginary-time slices. This crucial capability was already implicit in the benchmark MES-PIMD simulations in that foundational work. To isolate this topological effect from other nonadiabatic effects, we introduce a geometric signature matrix (for the CI) and a winding-number-induced phase factor, constructing an ad hoc GP-excluded MES-PI method. Comparing this ad hoc baseline against the rigorous MES-PI approach allows us to unambiguously quantify the impact of the GP on thermodynamic properties. While simpler approximations exist when only the ground electronic-state is considered, MES-PIMD is the most general and accurate approach applicable to real complex systems where the location and topology of CI seams are often not known a priori.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了多电子态路径积分方法能够自然捕捉几何相位效应，并通过对比排除几何相位的特设方法，量化了几何相位对热力学性质的影响。
AI.motivation: 标准基于玻恩-奥本海默近似的虚时路径积分分子动力学无法考虑几何相位效应，可能导致低温热力学性质出现显著误差。几何相位是量子锥形交叉产生的基本效应，对振动能级有深远影响。
AI.method: 采用多电子态路径积分公式，通过电子迹的统计加权重叠矩阵乘积自然捕捉几何相位效应。为分离拓扑效应，引入几何特征矩阵和绕数诱导相位因子，构建排除几何相位的特设方法作为基线。
AI.result: 多电子态路径积分分子动力学能够准确捕捉几何相位效应，通过对比排除几何相位的特设方法，可以明确量化几何相位对热力学性质的影响。
AI.conclusion: 虽然存在仅考虑基态电子态的简化近似，但多电子态路径积分分子动力学是最通用和准确的方法，适用于真实复杂系统，其中锥形交叉的位置和拓扑通常事先未知。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Network Approach for Surface Wave Propagation in Functionally Graded Magnetoelastic Layered Media
summary: This paper investigates propagation of SH-waves in a layered composite structure consisting of a pre-stressed functionally graded magnetoelastic orthotropic layer overlying a pre-stressed functionally graded orthotropic half-space under the influence of gravity. The study introduces a physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for the dispersion analysis of SH-waves in the considered composite medium. As a benchmark, an analytical solution to the dispersion relation is derived and used to validate accuracy and reliability of the proposed PINN formulation. In the developed PINN model, the phase velocity corresponding to a prescribed wave number is treated as a trainable parameter, enabling the determination of the dispersion relation associated with the nonlinear eigenvalue problem. The Adam optimizer is employed to minimize the loss function during the training process. In addition, the effects of different activation functions and network architectures, including variations in number of hidden layers and neurons, are systematically investigated to study the performance of the proposed framework. Error analysis is carried out using several norms, namely $L_1$, $L_2$, RMSE, relative absolute error, and $L_\infty$, to assess the accuracy of the predictions. Furthermore, the variation of phase velocity with wave number under different material parameters is investigated. The comparison between the analytical and PINN-based results demonstrates excellent agreement, confirming the effectiveness of the proposed deep learning approach for analysing dispersion relations in complex layered composite structures.

AI.tldr: 使用物理信息神经网络(PINN)分析SH波在预应力和重力作用下的功能梯度磁弹性正交各向异性层状复合材料中的传播特性，并与解析解进行验证。
AI.motivation: 研究复杂层状复合材料中SH波的传播特性，传统方法难以处理非线性特征值问题，需要开发新的深度学习方法来解决这类复杂物理问题。
AI.method: 提出物理信息神经网络(PINN)框架，将相速度作为可训练参数，使用Adam优化器最小化损失函数，系统研究不同激活函数和网络架构的影响。
AI.result: PINN预测结果与解析解高度一致，通过多种误差范数验证了方法的准确性，成功分析了不同材料参数下相速度随波数的变化关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度学习框架能有效分析复杂层状复合材料中的频散关系，为类似复杂物理问题的数值模拟提供了新方法。

title: Scaling laws of electron and hole spin relaxation in indirect band gap (In,Al)As/AlAs quantum dots
summary: We investigate the electron and heavy hole spin dynamics as a function of magnetic field in ensembles of indirect band gap (In,Al)As/AlAs quantum dots (QDs) with type-I band alignment. Employing a comprehensive model that accounts for both the exciton level quartet and the magnetic-field-driven redistribution of excitons between these states via spin relaxation processes, we extract the electron ($τ_{se}$) and heavy hole ($τ_{sh}$) spin relaxation times as a function of magnetic field for QDs of varying sizes. Our analysis reveals that both $τ_{se}(B)$ and $τ_{sh}(B)$ exhibit power-law scaling behavior, yet the scaling exponents for electrons and heavy holes show markedly different evolution with QD size. For QDs with a diameter of about 9 nm, we find $τ_{se}(B)\propto B^{-5}$ and $τ_{sh}(B)\propto B^{-3}$. Remarkably, increasing the QD diameter to about 16 nm results in a drastic change of the scaling laws, with both $τ_{se}(B)$ and $τ_{sh}(B)$ following a $\propto B^{-9}$ dependence. We discuss the underlying mechanisms responsible for this size-dependent transformation of the magnetic field scaling behavior of carrier spin relaxation.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了(In,Al)As/AlAs量子点中电子和重空穴自旋弛豫时间随磁场的变化，发现其遵循幂律标度关系，且标度指数随量子点尺寸发生显著变化。
AI.motivation: 研究间接带隙(In,Al)As/AlAs量子点中电子和重空穴自旋弛豫的磁场依赖性，探索量子点尺寸对自旋弛豫机制的影响。
AI.method: 采用综合模型考虑激子能级四重态和磁场驱动的激子再分布，通过自旋弛豫过程提取不同尺寸量子点的电子和重空穴自旋弛豫时间随磁场的变化。
AI.result: 发现电子和重空穴自旋弛豫时间均呈现幂律标度行为，但标度指数随量子点尺寸显著变化：9nm直径量子点中τ_se∝B^{-5}、τ_sh∝B^{-3}，而16nm直径量子点中两者均变为∝B^{-9}。
AI.conclusion: 量子点尺寸对电子和重空穴自旋弛豫的磁场标度行为有决定性影响，揭示了尺寸依赖的自旋弛豫机制转变。

title: Magnetism and magnetoelastic effect in 2D van der Waals multiferroic CuCrP2S6
summary: We report a magnetic and neutron diffraction study on the ground state magnetism and field evolution of single crystal van der Waals multiferroic CuCrP2S6. The ordered moments align along the b axis in the A-type antiferromagnetic configuration with a spin-flop transition along the same direction. Field application along a introduces a smooth transition to a fully-polarized ferromagnetic state via in-plane spin rotation. These findings resolve the ambiguity of the ground state magnetization direction in CuCrP2S6 and uncover its field responses, providing a firm basis for future magnetoelectric study. A magnetoelastic coupling effect connecting the interlayer spacing and the magnetic order was further revealed, highlighting the out-of-plane strain as an effective control knob for tuning magnetism both in this system and in related van der Waals magnets.

AI.tldr: CuCrP2S6的基态磁结构为A型反铁磁，磁矩沿b轴排列，存在自旋翻转转变。沿a轴施加磁场可通过面内自旋旋转实现完全极化铁磁态。研究还揭示了磁弹性耦合效应。
AI.motivation: 解决CuCrP2S6基态磁化方向的模糊性，揭示其磁场响应特性，为未来的磁电研究提供坚实基础。同时探索范德华磁体中的磁弹性耦合效应。
AI.method: 采用磁性和中子衍射研究，对单晶CuCrP2S6进行基态磁性和磁场演化分析。通过不同方向的磁场应用观察磁结构转变。
AI.result: 确定基态为A型反铁磁结构，磁矩沿b轴排列；发现沿b轴的自旋翻转转变；沿a轴施加磁场可实现完全极化铁磁态；揭示层间距与磁序之间的磁弹性耦合效应。
AI.conclusion: 研究明确了CuCrP2S6的基态磁结构，揭示了其磁场响应机制，并发现面外应变可作为调控磁性的有效手段，为相关范德华磁体的研究提供了重要基础。

title: Imaging the Meissner effect and local superfluid stiffness in a graphene superconductor
summary: We report the observation of the Meissner effect in a rhombohedral graphene superconductor, realized via direct imaging of the static fringe magnetic field. In our few-micron sample, the onset of superconductivity manifests as a diamagnetic response that screens only $\sim 100$ ppm of the applied magnetic field. Tracking the evolution of the resulting nanotesla-scale fields in real space allows us to observe the entry of superconducting vortices and map the local superfluid stiffness, $ρ_s$. Correlating fringe field signals from both Meissner screening and magnetically ordered states, we show that superconductivity onsets in the midst of a continuous quantum phase transition to a canted spin ferromagnet. Within the superconducting state, we find the temperature dependence of $ρ_s$ to be incompatible with isotropic Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer theory and the zero-temperature stiffness $ρ_s^0$ to be linearly proportional to $T_c$, constraining future theoretical models of superconductivity in this system.

AI.tldr: 在菱面体石墨烯超导体中观察到迈斯纳效应，通过静态边缘磁场直接成像实现。超导性表现为仅屏蔽约100 ppm外加磁场的抗磁响应，可实时观测涡旋进入并测量超流刚度ρ_s。
AI.motivation: 研究菱面体石墨烯超导体的超导性质，特别是迈斯纳效应和超流刚度的温度依赖性，以理解该系统中的超导机制。
AI.method: 通过直接成像静态边缘磁场来观察迈斯纳效应，使用纳米特斯拉级磁场测量技术，实时追踪超导涡旋进入过程，并测量局部超流刚度ρ_s。
AI.result: 观察到超导性仅屏蔽约100 ppm外加磁场，超导出现在连续量子相变到倾斜自旋铁磁体的过程中，ρ_s的温度依赖性与各向同性BCS理论不符，且零温刚度ρ_s^0与T_c呈线性比例关系。
AI.conclusion: 菱面体石墨烯超导体的超导性质与常规BCS理论不同，ρ_s的温度依赖性和ρ_s^0与T_c的线性关系为未来理论模型提供了重要约束条件。

title: Quantum Thermalization beyond Non-Integrability and Quantum Scars in a Multispecies Bose-Josephson Junction
summary: This work investigates the relationship between quantum chaos and thermalization in a three-species Bose-Josephson Junction (BJJ) with mutual interactions, without coupling to any external environment. The analysis is grounded in the Eigenstate Thermalization Hypothesis (ETH), the modern framework for quantum thermalization, in which non-integrability and chaos are historically assumed as prerequisites. After a thorough characterization of quantum chaos in this system, we examine the occurrence of thermal behavior expected when ETH holds. We identify three distinct regimes: chaotic, integrable, and separable. Remarkably, quantum thermalization occurs in both the chaotic and integrable regimes, while it breaks down in the separable limit - supporting that non-integrability is not a necessary condition for thermalization. Furthermore, since the system exhibits collective phenomena in the semiclassical limit, we identify athermal states in the chaotic regime classifiable as quantum scars, which show no signs of thermalization, consistently with a weak form of ETH. These findings contribute to the understanding of ergodicity breaking, emerging statistical behavior, and non-equilibrium dynamics in ultracold many-body quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 三物种玻色-约瑟夫森结中量子混沌与热化的关系研究，发现热化不仅发生在混沌区，也出现在可积区，挑战了非可积性是热化必要条件的传统观点。
AI.motivation: 研究量子混沌与热化之间的关系，特别是在没有外部环境耦合的孤立量子系统中。传统观点认为非可积性和混沌是量子热化的前提条件，但本文旨在检验这一假设是否总是成立。
AI.method: 基于本征态热化假说(ETH)框架，分析三物种玻色-约瑟夫森结(BJJ)系统。首先对量子混沌进行系统表征，然后研究不同参数区域的热化行为。识别了混沌、可积和可分离三种不同区域，并分析各区域的热化表现。
AI.result: 1. 量子热化不仅发生在混沌区，也出现在可积区，表明非可积性不是热化的必要条件；2. 在可分离极限下热化失效；3. 在混沌区发现了可分类为量子疤痕的非热态，这些态表现出弱ETH形式，没有热化迹象。
AI.conclusion: 该研究挑战了非可积性是量子热化必要条件的传统观点，为理解超冷多体量子系统中的遍历性破缺、涌现统计行为和非平衡动力学提供了新见解。量子疤痕的发现进一步丰富了弱ETH框架下的非热化现象理解。

title: Suppressed excitonic effects enable high mobility, high-yield photoconductivity in a two-dimensional polymer crystal with axial pyridine coordination
summary: Two-dimensional polymers (2DPs) and their layer-stacked covalent organic frameworks (2D COFs) offer modular, atomically precise platforms for organic optoelectronics, yet their photoconductive responses remain fundamentally constrained by strong excitonic effects and localized charge transport. Here, we demonstrate that a diyne-linked 2DP crystal with axial pyridine coordination overcomes this limitation, enabling simultaneous efficient free-carrier generation and band-like transport. Introducing pyridine ligands that axially coordinate to Cu-porphyrin nodes transforms weak van der Waals stacking into a pyridine-bridged architecture with pronounced interlayer band dispersion and substantially reduced carrier effective masses. The resulting strong interlayer electronic coupling suppresses the exciton binding energy to well below thermal energy, such that optical excitation directly populates delocalized electronic states. Time-resolved terahertz spectroscopy reveals Drude-type photoconductivity with room-temperature mobilities approaching 500 cm^2 V^-1 s^-1 and a photon-to-free-carrier conversion ratio of ~0.4, yielding a photoconductive response that exceeds that of state-of-the-art organic and many inorganic photoactive materials. These results establish interlayer coordination as a powerful strategy for mitigating excitonic effects and accessing inorganic-like charge transport in organic 2D crystals, opening a pathway toward highly efficient photo-to-electricity conversion in organic-based systems.

AI.tldr: 通过轴向吡啶配位连接的二维聚合物晶体实现了高效自由载流子生成和类带传输，突破了有机材料中强激子效应的限制。
AI.motivation: 二维聚合物和共价有机框架在有机光电子学中具有潜力，但其光电导响应受到强激子效应和局域电荷传输的限制，需要寻找突破这些限制的方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种二炔连接的二维聚合物晶体，通过吡啶配体轴向配位到铜卟啉节点上，将弱范德华堆叠转变为吡啶桥接结构，增强了层间电子耦合。
AI.result: 实现了激子结合能低于热能，室温迁移率接近500 cm² V⁻¹ s⁻¹，光子到自由载流子转换比约0.4，光电导响应超过最先进的有机材料和许多无机材料。
AI.conclusion: 层间配位是减轻激子效应、在有机二维晶体中实现类无机电荷传输的有效策略，为有机系统的高效光电转换开辟了新途径。

title: Microscopic Structure and Dynamics of Interfacial Water at Fluorinated vs Nonfluorinated Surfaces -- Insights from Ab-Initio Simulations and IR Spectroscopy
summary: Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances are a class of synthetic chemical compounds widely used as coatings to lower surface energies. Yet the microscopic mechanisms of their weak interaction with water and organic compounds remain poorly understood. Here, we perform large-scale density-functional-theory molecular dynamics simulations to investigate water at self-assembled monolayers (SAMs) of fluorinated and non-fluorinated hydrocarbons. We analyze the interfacial water structure and compare it to the prototypical hydrophobic air-water interface. The interfacial water structure at both SAMs closely resembles that at the air-water interface, featuring a distinct depletion layer and a two-dimensional hydrogen-bond network parallel to the surface. Computed anisotropic infrared spectra reproduce key experimental signatures observed in surface-enhanced infrared absorption spectroscopy (SEIRAS), including the presence of free OH vibrations directly probing the local surface-water interactions. Notably, while the free OH stretch at the hydrocarbon SAM-water interface exhibits a red shift relative to the air-water interface, indicative of weak binding, the fluorinated SAM-water interface displays a weakly blue-shifted free OH mode, in agreement with experiment. This frequency behavior, which defies common interpretations based on the vibrational Stark effect, indicates that dispersive rather than electrostatic interactions dominate the interaction between water and SAMs. Analysis of spectral line shapes further shows that the reorientation dynamics of water molecules are significantly slower near the fluorinated surface, as commonly observed at hydrophilic surfaces. This indicates that fluorinated surfaces, despite being macroscopically more hydrophobic than their unfluorinated counterparts, exhibit spectroscopic characteristics that neither qualify it as hydrophobic nor hydrophilic.

AI.tldr: 通过DFT分子动力学模拟研究氟化和非氟化自组装单分子层界面的水结构，发现其与空气-水界面相似，但氟化表面表现出独特的蓝色位移自由OH振动，表明色散相互作用主导界面作用
AI.motivation: 全氟和多氟烷基物质作为表面涂层广泛应用，但其与水和有机化合物的弱相互作用的微观机制仍不清楚，需要深入研究
AI.method: 采用大规模密度泛函理论分子动力学模拟，研究氟化和非氟化烃类自组装单分子层界面的水结构，分析界面水结构并与空气-水界面比较，计算各向异性红外光谱
AI.result: 两种SAM界面水结构与空气-水界面相似，都有明显的耗尽层和二维氢键网络；氟化SAM-水界面显示弱蓝色位移的自由OH模式，这与振动斯塔克效应的常见解释相悖，表明色散相互作用主导；氟化表面附近水分子的重定向动力学显著减慢
AI.conclusion: 氟化表面在宏观上比未氟化表面更疏水，但表现出既不属于疏水性也不属于亲水性的光谱特征，色散相互作用而非静电相互作用主导水与SAMs的相互作用

title: Assessing the classicality of photon echo from excitons in lead halide perovskite nanocrystals
summary: Photon echo (PE) spectroscopy is a powerful technique for probing decoherence mechanisms and charge carrier dynamics in semiconductor systems. Beyond traditional coherence measurements, characterizing the photon statistics of the echo signal is important for assessing its potential in quantum information applications and understanding the underlying quantum mechanical processes. Here, we study the photon statistics of PE signals generated by excitons in ensembles of lead halide perovskite CsPbI$_3$ nanocrystals at cryogenic temperature of 2 K using continuous-variable quantum state optical tomography based on homodyne detection. Pronounced Rabi oscillations of PE amplitude allow us to evaluate the statistics for various pulse areas in the excitation sequence. The damping of the oscillations with increasing pulse area is attributed to spatial excitation inhomogeneity and excitation-induced dephasing. Despite the large ensemble of optically addressed excitons, the efficiency of generated PE signals is low which is attributed to complex energy structure of excitons and non-radiative recombination channels in CsPbI$_3$ nanocrystals. We analyze the statistical characteristics of PE via the second-order correlation function $g^{(2)}(0)$ and the characteristic function for different combinations of the areas of the excitation pulses. Our results show that $g^{(2)}(0) = 1$, and the characteristic function of the PE signal corresponds to classical behavior. Despite the relatively low efficiency, the photon echo exhibits a high degree of coherence and minimal classical noise, consistent with Poissonian statistics.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用连续变量量子态光学层析技术，在2K低温下测量CsPbI₃钙钛矿纳米晶中激子产生的光子回波信号的光子统计特性，发现其呈现经典泊松统计行为。
AI.motivation: 光子回波光谱是研究半导体退相干机制和载流子动力学的重要技术。除了传统的相干性测量，表征回波信号的光子统计特性对于评估其在量子信息应用中的潜力以及理解底层量子力学过程至关重要。
AI.method: 在2K低温下，使用基于零差探测的连续变量量子态光学层析技术，研究CsPbI₃钙钛矿纳米晶中激子产生的光子回波信号。通过观察明显的拉比振荡，评估不同脉冲面积下的统计特性，并通过二阶相关函数g²(0)和特征函数分析光子统计。
AI.result: 研究发现g²(0)=1，回波信号的特征函数对应经典行为。尽管光子回波信号生成效率较低（归因于激子的复杂能级结构和非辐射复合通道），但表现出高度的相干性和最小的经典噪声，符合泊松统计。
AI.conclusion: CsPbI₃钙钛矿纳米晶中的光子回波信号呈现经典泊松统计特性，具有高度相干性和低噪声，但其低效率限制了量子信息应用潜力。拉比振荡的阻尼归因于空间激发不均匀性和激发诱导退相干。

title: Benchmarking the accuracy of superconducting pair-pair correlations within Constrained Path Quantum Monte Carlo
summary: Ground state properties of the Hubbard model are of fundamental importance to understand the mechanism of unconventional superconductivity in the high-T_c cuprates and other materials. One of the most powerful numerical methods for strongly interacting models is quantum Monte Carlo, which however faces a fundamental limitation, the Fermion sign problem. The sign problem can be mitigated using approximate methods such as Constrained Path Monte Carlo, but additional approximations must be made in order to measure different observables, particularly for operators that do not commute with the Hamiltonian. We examine critically the most commonly used approximation, back propagation, as well as a recently proposed constraint release measurement technique. In comparisons with a variety of systems that can be solved numerically exactly by other methods, we find that back propagation tends to underestimate superconducting pair-pair correlations. The constraint release technique can provide accurate results, with the disadvantages that it much more computationally expensive and reintroduces the sign problem.

AI.tldr: 本文批判性评估了Hubbard模型中克服费米子符号问题的两种近似方法：反向传播和约束释放技术，发现反向传播会低估超导对-对关联，而约束释放技术虽然准确但计算成本高且重新引入符号问题。
AI.motivation: Hubbard模型的基态性质对理解高温超导机制至关重要，但量子蒙特卡洛方法面临费米子符号问题的根本限制。虽然约束路径蒙特卡洛可以缓解符号问题，但在测量不满足哈密顿量的可观测量时需要额外近似，因此需要评估这些近似方法的准确性。
AI.method: 研究批判性地评估了两种常用近似方法：反向传播和约束释放测量技术。通过与多种可通过其他方法精确数值求解的系统进行比较，分析这两种方法的性能。
AI.result: 研究发现反向传播倾向于低估超导对-对关联。约束释放技术可以提供准确结果，但缺点是其计算成本高得多，并且重新引入了符号问题。
AI.conclusion: 对于Hubbard模型中的量子蒙特卡洛模拟，需要在计算效率和测量精度之间做出权衡：反向传播虽然计算效率高但会低估关键物理量，而约束释放技术准确但计算成本高且重新引入符号问题。

title: Double-peak Majorana bound states in altermagnet--superconductor heterostructures
summary: We study Majorana bound states in a planar Josephson junction in which the middle channel is a $d$-wave altermagnetic metal deposited on a proximitized two-dimensional electron gas. In the topological regime, the near-zero-energy states reveals a characteristic double-peak spatial profile, with the Majorana wavefunction localized near the altermagnet--superconductor interfaces. Using simplified theoretical models, we show that anisotropic hopping intrinsic to altermagnetism naturally generates interface-localized low-energy states, providing the natural explanation for the double-peak structure. In a nanowire geometry with extended normal metallic regions, the same feature persists but the Majorana bound states become more sensitive to the chemical potential compared to the case in planar Josephson junction. In a T-shaped Josephson junction, multiple near-zero-energy states appear, and the Majorana bound state expected at the crossing point is found to be localized near the interfaces, demonstrating that the localization of the Majorana bound states is primarily governed by interface boundaries rather than by the junction geometry. These results show that anisotropic hopping and interface structure play a central role in altermagnet-based topological superconductors and provide a promising route toward a network of controllable Majorana bound states without external magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 研究d波交变磁体金属中马约拉纳束缚态的空间分布特征，发现其呈现双峰结构并局域在交变磁体-超导体界面附近，界面结构比结几何对局域化影响更大。
AI.motivation: 探索在无需外加磁场的交变磁体基拓扑超导体中实现可控马约拉纳束缚态网络的可能性，理解交变磁体各向异性对马约拉纳态空间分布的影响。
AI.method: 使用简化理论模型研究平面约瑟夫森结、纳米线几何和T形约瑟夫森结中马约拉纳束缚态的空间分布特性，分析交变磁体各向异性跳跃和界面结构的作用。
AI.result: 马约拉纳束缚态呈现特征性双峰空间分布，局域在交变磁体-超导体界面附近；各向异性跳跃自然产生界面局域低能态；在T形结中，多个近零能态出现，交叉点处的马约拉纳态仍局域在界面附近。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性跳跃和界面结构在交变磁体基拓扑超导体中起核心作用，为实现无需外加磁场的可控马约拉纳束缚态网络提供了有前景的途径。

title: Crossover Scaling of Binder Cumulant and its application in Non-reciprocal Sandpiles
summary: In this letter, we unveil a robust, pre-asymptotic scaling regime for the Binder cumulant $U_L$, a central finite-size scaling tool, demonstrating $U_L\sim N^{-1} |t|^{-dν}$ (disordered phase) and $\frac{2}{3}-U_L\sim N^{-1} |t|^{-dν}$ (ordered phase), with $t$ being the reduced control parameter, and $N$, $d$, $ν$ represent the total number of sites, the dimensionality, and correlation length exponent, respectively. Leveraging this result, we resolve a fundamental question on the stability of universality classes under the breaking of microscopic reciprocity. For the conserved Manna sandpile, we show that reciprocal biases preserve its universality class, merely shifting the critical point. In striking contrast, any non-reciprocal interaction acts as a relevant perturbation, decisively driving the system's critical exponents to flow from their non-mean-field values towards the mean-field related ones. This flow establishes non-reciprocity as a generic mechanism inducing mean-field criticality in conserved, non-equilibrium systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了Binder累积量的稳健预渐近标度行为，并证明微观非互易性会破坏普适类稳定性，驱动系统从非平均场临界指数流向平均场值。
AI.motivation: 研究有限尺寸标度工具Binder累积量的预渐近标度行为，并探讨微观互易性破坏对普适类稳定性的影响，特别是在守恒非平衡系统中。
AI.method: 通过理论分析推导Binder累积量的预渐近标度关系，然后应用于守恒Manna沙堆模型，研究互易性和非互易性相互作用对临界行为的影响。
AI.result: 发现互易性偏置仅移动临界点而不改变普适类，但任何非互易性相互作用都会作为相关扰动，驱动临界指数从非平均场值流向平均场相关值。
AI.conclusion: 非互易性是守恒非平衡系统中诱导平均场临界性的通用机制，为理解普适类在微观对称性破坏下的稳定性提供了新视角。

title: Electrical and thermal magnetotransport in altermagnetic CrSb
summary: Chromium antimonide has emerged as a key material platform for studying altermagnetism because of its simple binary composition, high Néel temperature, and semimetallic electronic structure. Here, we investigate electrical and thermal magnetotransport in single-crystalline CrSb using steady-and pulsed-magnetic fields up to 65 T, and complement these measurements with neutron diffraction and magnetization data. We confirm the compensated magnetic structure and observe a large nonsaturating magnetoresistance together with a pronounced nonlinear Hall response at low temperatures. Multicarrier modeling, supported by mobility-spectrum analysis, reveals coexisting electron- and hole-like charge carriers with mobilities up to ~3000 cm2/Vs and shows that the number of transport channels that can be resolved strongly depends on the accessible magnetic-field range. Thermal-transport measurements further reveal a nonlinear thermal Hall response and a thermal conductivity substantially exceeding a simple Wiedemann-Franz law. The broadly similar field and temperature evolution of electrical and thermal transport point to a dominant electronic contribution, while the remaining deviations indicate additional heat-carrying channels.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高达65T的磁场测量，结合中子衍射和磁化数据，系统研究了CrSb单晶的电学和热学磁输运特性，揭示了其作为反铁磁半金属的复杂多载流子输运行为和非线性霍尔响应。
AI.motivation: 铬锑化物(CrSb)因其简单的二元组成、高尼尔温度和半金属电子结构，已成为研究交变磁性的关键材料平台。然而，对其电学和热学磁输运特性的全面理解仍不充分，特别是在强磁场下的行为。
AI.method: 使用稳态和脉冲磁场（高达65T）测量CrSb单晶的电学和热学磁输运，结合中子衍射和磁化数据验证补偿磁结构。采用多载流子模型和迁移率谱分析解析电荷载流子特性。
AI.result: 确认了补偿磁结构，观察到大的非饱和磁阻和显著的非线性霍尔响应。多载流子分析揭示了电子和空穴型载流子共存，迁移率高达~3000 cm²/Vs。热输运测量显示非线性热霍尔响应和超出维德曼-弗朗兹定律的热导率。
AI.conclusion: 电学和热学输运的相似场温演化表明主导的电子贡献，而剩余偏差表明存在额外的热传导通道。研究强调了可解析的输运通道数量强烈依赖于可访问的磁场范围。

title: Coupling Quantum Mechanical Modeling and Molecular Dynamics on Heterogeneous Supercomputers for Studying Distal Mutation Effects on Drug Binding in HIV-1
summary: Predicting how protein mutations affect drug binding remains a major challenge, particularly when the mutations are distal from the binding site. In this study, we introduce a coupled simulation workflow that combines long-time-scale molecular dynamics (MD) with high-throughput quantum mechanical (QM) analysis to reveal the electronic structure signatures of mutation induced drug resistance in the HIV-1 protease. Our workflow leverages GPU-accelerated MD to generate conformational ensembles, and performs in-operando linear-scaling density functional theory (DFT) calculations on selected frames parallelized on a coupled partition of CPU nodes. This design enables efficient, massively parallel quantum analysis of protein-ligand complexes at atomic resolution. Using this approach, we investigate resistance to the antiviral Darunavir in a multi-mutant HIV-1 protease variant. By mapping the network of electronic interactions across the binding interface, our results highlight the critical role of conformational sampling and quantum insight in understanding distal mutation effects, and demonstrate a scalable computational strategy for studying complex biophysical mechanisms of drug resistance. We argue that such kind of analysis may pave the way for designing inhibitors that maintain binding stability against systemic, mutation-induced destabilization.

AI.tldr: 结合长时间尺度分子动力学与高通量量子力学分析的工作流程，揭示HIV-1蛋白酶中突变诱导药物耐药性的电子结构特征
AI.motivation: 预测蛋白质突变如何影响药物结合是一个重大挑战，特别是当突变远离结合位点时。需要开发新方法来理解远端突变导致的药物耐药机制。
AI.method: 引入耦合模拟工作流程：结合GPU加速的长时间尺度分子动力学生成构象集合，并行化线性缩放密度泛函理论计算，对选定帧进行高通量量子力学分析
AI.result: 成功应用于多突变HIV-1蛋白酶变体对Darunavir的耐药性研究，通过映射结合界面的电子相互作用网络，揭示了构象采样和量子洞察在理解远端突变效应中的关键作用
AI.conclusion: 该工作流程为研究复杂药物耐药性生物物理机制提供了可扩展的计算策略，可能为设计对抗系统性突变诱导去稳定化的抑制剂铺平道路

title: Importance of Electronic Entropy for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) enable large-scale atomistic simulations but remain challenged in describing mixed-valence materials where charge ordering strongly influences thermodynamic stability. Here we investigate the role of electronic entropy in MLIP structural optimization of the battery cathode material \ce{NaFePO4}. We show that conventional MLIPs fail to reproduce the correct stability of intermediate \ce{Na} concentrations because structural optimization leads to incorrect \ce{Fe^{2+}}/\ce{Fe^{3+}} charge assignments, resulting in erroneous energy ordering and convex-hull predictions. Analysis of magnetic moments during structural optimization reveals that MLIPs are unable to capture electronic entropy associated with charge ordering. To address this limitation, we introduce an approach that embeds charge-state information directly into the MLIP representation by distinguishing between \ce{Fe^{2+}} and \ce{Fe^{3+}} environments during training. Retraining CHGNet, cPaiNN, and MACE with this representation enables accurate structural optimization, correct identification of charge ordering, and improved agreement with density functional theory convex hulls. Our results demonstrate that incorporating electronic entropy into MLIP representations is essential for modeling charge-disordered materials and provide a practical framework for extending MLIP simulations to mixed-valence transition-metal systems.

AI.tldr: 传统机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）在描述混合价态材料时存在局限，无法准确预测NaFePO4电池正极材料中电荷有序化对热力学稳定性的影响，通过引入电荷态信息到MLIP表示中可以解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 混合价态材料中电荷有序化对热力学稳定性有重要影响，但传统机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）无法准确描述这种效应，特别是在电池正极材料NaFePO4的结构优化中，导致错误的稳定性预测。
AI.method: 通过将电荷态信息直接嵌入MLIP表示中，在训练时区分Fe²⁺和Fe³⁺环境，重新训练CHGNet、cPaiNN和MACE等MLIP模型，以捕捉与电荷有序化相关的电子熵。
AI.result: 改进后的MLIPs能够准确进行结构优化，正确识别电荷有序化，并与密度泛函理论的凸包预测结果更加一致，显著提高了对混合价态过渡金属系统的模拟精度。
AI.conclusion: 将电子熵纳入MLIP表示对于模拟电荷无序材料至关重要，为扩展MLIP模拟到混合价态过渡金属系统提供了实用框架。

title: Comparing the orbital angular momentum and magnetic moment of magnon in the Kagome antiferromagnet with negative spin chirality
summary: The orbital dynamics of magnons have recently drawn interest due to their potential roles in thermal and orbital transport phenomena in magnetic insulators. In this study, we investigate the orbital magnetic moment (OMM) and orbital angular momentum (OAM) of magnons in a Kagome antiferromagnet with negative vector chirality, focusing on the distinction between thermodynamic and wave-packet-based definitions. We compute the Berry curvature, the OMM, and the OAM in momentum space under an external magnetic field. Our results reveal a quantitative difference between the OMM and OAM, yet their associated Nernst coefficients exhibit similar temperature and field dependence in transport. Our results provide a quantitative comparison between the thermodynamic and wave-packet formulations of magnon orbital dynamics.

AI.tldr: 研究Kagome反铁磁体中磁振子的轨道磁矩和轨道角动量，比较热力学和波包定义，计算Berry曲率及相关物理量，发现轨道磁矩与轨道角动量存在定量差异但对应能斯特系数相似。
AI.motivation: 磁振子的轨道动力学因其在磁性绝缘体热输运和轨道输运现象中的潜在作用而受到关注，需要理解热力学和波包定义之间的区别。
AI.method: 在负矢量手性的Kagome反铁磁体中，计算动量空间中的Berry曲率、轨道磁矩和轨道角动量，在外加磁场下进行分析。
AI.result: 轨道磁矩和轨道角动量存在定量差异，但它们对应的能斯特系数在温度和磁场依赖关系上表现出相似性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为磁振子轨道动力学的热力学和波包表述提供了定量比较，有助于理解磁振子轨道输运现象。

title: Antiferromagnetic stripe phase and large-gap insulating ground state of the correlated $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$~R30$^{\circ}$-Sn/Si(111) single atomic layer
summary: The one-third monolayer Sn layer on Si(111) has long been considered a benchmark system for exploring two-dimensional Mott physics, owing to its narrow bandwidth and sizable on-site Coulomb repulsion. Previous experiments suggested the emergence of a low-temperature Mott insulating phase with an energy gap of only a few tens of meV, while theory predicted a possible antiferromagnetic ordering that remained experimentally elusive. Here, by combining low-temperature scanning tunneling microscopy/spectroscopy with first-principles calculations, we reveal that the $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$~R30$^{\circ}$-Sn/Si(111) surface undergoes a transition below 30K into a robust insulating state characterized by a remarkably large gap of about 440 $\pm$ 120 meV at 4K, five to ten times larger than previously reported. Quasiparticle interference imaging uncovers a well-defined $2\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$~R30$^{\circ}$-Sn/Si(111) superstructure, providing direct evidence for a two-dimensional stripe-like antiferromagnetic order. Ab initio calculations reveal that the silicon substrate stabilizes this phase through strong nonlocal tin-tin interactions, highlighting the decisive role of substrate-driven correlations in the $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$~R30$^{\circ}$-Sn/Si(111) system.

AI.tldr: 在Si(111)上的1/3单层Sn系统中发现比预期大5-10倍的绝缘带隙(440±120 meV)，并首次实验观测到二维条纹状反铁磁序，揭示了衬底驱动关联的关键作用。
AI.motivation: Si(111)上的1/3单层Sn层长期以来被认为是研究二维Mott物理的基准系统，但先前实验观测到的绝缘带隙很小(几十meV)，理论预测的反铁磁序一直缺乏实验证据。本研究旨在澄清该系统的低温相性质。
AI.method: 结合低温扫描隧道显微镜/谱学(STM/STS)实验和第一性原理计算，通过准粒子干涉成像揭示表面超结构，并利用ab initio计算分析衬底效应。
AI.result: 发现系统在30K以下转变为强绝缘态，带隙达440±120 meV，比先前报告大5-10倍；准粒子干涉成像揭示了2√3×√3超结构，首次提供了二维条纹状反铁磁序的直接实验证据；计算表明硅衬底通过强非局域Sn-Sn相互作用稳定该相。
AI.conclusion: √3×√3 R30°-Sn/Si(111)系统展现出比预期更强的绝缘性和明确的二维反铁磁序，衬底驱动的关联效应在该系统中起决定性作用，修正了对这一基准Mott系统物理性质的理解。

title: Caloric Phenomena and Stirling-Cycle Performance in Heisenberg- Kitaev Magnon Systems
summary: We investigate the Stirling-cycle performance of a Heisenberg--Kitaev magnonic medium with Dzyaloshinskii--Moriya (DM) interactions. Using linear spin-wave theory, we show the DM interaction preserves spectral symmetry, yielding even caloric responses and symmetric Stirling engine efficiency. In contrast, bond-dependent Kitaev exchange asymmetrically distorts the magnonic density of states, enabling distinct direct and inverse caloric effects. Consequently, Kitaev-driven cycles achieve significantly higher efficiencies than DM-driven protocols, approaching a high-performance saturation regime for negative couplings. This establishes exchange-anisotropic magnets as highly tunable platforms for nanoscale solid-state energy conversion.

AI.tldr: DM相互作用保持谱对称性，产生对称的斯特林循环效率；而Kitaev交换不对称地扭曲磁子态密度，实现更高的能量转换效率
AI.motivation: 研究具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的Heisenberg-Kitaev磁子介质的斯特林循环性能，探索各向异性交换磁体作为纳米尺度固态能量转换平台的可调性
AI.method: 使用线性自旋波理论分析DM相互作用和Kitaev交换对磁子态密度的影响，比较两种驱动机制下的斯特林循环性能
AI.result: DM相互作用保持谱对称性，产生对称的卡路里响应和斯特林发动机效率；Kitaev交换不对称地扭曲磁子态密度，实现显著更高的效率，在负耦合时接近高性能饱和状态
AI.conclusion: 交换各向异性磁体是高度可调的纳米尺度固态能量转换平台，Kitaev驱动的循环比DM驱动的协议效率更高

title: Universal effect of ammonia pressure on synthesis of colloidal metal nitrides in molten salts
summary: Metal nitrides represent a large class of materials with extensive applications in optoelectronics, energy, and healthcare technologies. For example, GaN and related nitride semiconductors are key materials for solid-state lighting and high-power electronics, TiN and other early transition metal nitrides (TMNs) are widely used in wear-resistant alloys, tool coatings, catalysts and medical implants. Strong metal-nitrogen bonds grant nitrides structural rigidity as well as chemical and thermal stability. However, the covalency of metal-nitrogen bonds necessitates high temperatures to synthesize crystalline metal nitrides. Common synthetic routes include high-temperature solid-state nitridation, crystal growth in supercritical ammonia, molecular-beam epitaxy (MBE), reactive sputtering, and chemical vapor deposition (CVD). The solution synthesis of colloidal nitride nanocrystals (NCs) is rare and particularly challenging because commonly used solvents and surfactants decompose at temperatures far below those required for crystallization of most metal nitrides. Here we report a general approach to solution synthesis of colloidal metal nitride NCs by reacting metal halides and ammonia dissolved in molten inorganic salts at elevated pressures. Successful syntheses of colloidal TiN, VN, GaN, NbN, Mo2N, Ta3N5, W2N, as well as ternary Ti1-xVxN NCs, are demonstrated. These NCs expand the scope of solution-processable technologically important materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在熔融无机盐中使用金属卤化物和氨水合成胶体金属氮化物纳米晶的通用方法，成功制备了多种金属氮化物纳米晶。
AI.motivation: 金属氮化物在光电子、能源和医疗领域有广泛应用，但传统合成方法需要高温，而溶液合成胶体氮化物纳米晶因溶剂和表面活性剂在所需温度下分解而极具挑战性。
AI.method: 在高压条件下，将金属卤化物和氨水溶解在熔融无机盐中进行反应，实现胶体金属氮化物纳米晶的溶液合成。
AI.result: 成功合成了TiN、VN、GaN、NbN、Mo2N、Ta3N5、W2N以及三元Ti1-xVxN等多种胶体金属氮化物纳米晶。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为溶液可加工的重要技术材料提供了新的合成途径，扩展了胶体金属氮化物纳米晶的合成范围。

title: Controlling isomer population using a dual-oscillator infrared free-electron laser
summary: We report on the control and characterization of the isomer population of ions inside superfluid helium nanodroplets, using two-color operation of a dual-oscillator infrared free-electron laser. The timing of both lasers is highly synchronized, and their frequencies (or "colors") can be tuned independently over a wide range. Interaction of the singly deuterated proton-bound dimer of dihydrogen phosphate and formate inside helium nanodroplets with both colors enables the control over its isomer population and the recording of - one-color hidden - infrared spectra of individual isomers.

AI.tldr: 使用双振荡器红外自由电子激光器的双色操作，控制超流氦纳米液滴中离子的异构体分布，并记录单个异构体的红外光谱
AI.motivation: 传统单色红外光谱难以区分和表征超流氦纳米液滴中离子的不同异构体，需要开发新方法来控制和记录单个异构体的光谱
AI.method: 采用双振荡器红外自由电子激光器，实现高度同步的双色操作，两个激光器的频率可独立调谐。通过让氘代磷酸二氢盐和甲酸盐的单质子结合二聚体与双色激光相互作用，控制其异构体分布
AI.result: 成功控制了超流氦纳米液滴中离子的异构体分布，并记录了单色激光无法观测到的单个异构体的红外光谱
AI.conclusion: 双色自由电子激光技术为超流氦纳米液滴中离子的异构体控制和光谱表征提供了有效方法，能够揭示传统单色光谱无法观测的分子结构信息

title: Beyond the Quantum Picture: The Electrodynamic Origin of Chiral Nanoplasmonics
summary: Chiral plasmonic nanostructures are rapidly emerging as ideal substrates for enantioselective sensing, chiral near-field engineering, and plasmon-assisted catalysis, owing to their exceptional sensitivity to structural handedness. However, the physical origin of plasmonic chirality, whether intrinsically quantum or primarily governed by collective electrodynamics, remains an open question, limiting the development of predictive theoretical methods for the design of novel chiral plasmonic architectures. Here, we show that a fully atomistic classical electrodynamic model, coupling intraband charge transport and interband polarization, quantitatively reproduces state-of-the-art \textit{ab initio} and experimental chiroptical spectra across the quantum-to-classical regime, from atomistically defined chiral Ag and Au nanostructures to DNA-origami-assembled Au nanorods containing up to $\sim 10^5$ atoms. Our results support a unified electrodynamic origin of plasmonic chirality, providing the missing foundation to connect local structural motifs to chiroptical response and local chiral near fields, and paving the way for the atomistically defined, rational design of chiral plasmonic nanostructures optimized for targeted applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过全原子经典电动力学模型，揭示了等离子体手性的统一电动力学起源，为手性等离子体纳米结构的理性设计提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 手性等离子体纳米结构在手性传感、近场工程和催化等领域具有重要应用，但其物理起源（量子效应还是集体电动力学）尚不明确，这限制了预测性理论方法和新型结构设计的发展。
AI.method: 采用全原子经典电动力学模型，耦合带内电荷传输和带间极化，从原子尺度模拟手性银和金纳米结构，并与最先进的从头算方法和实验光谱进行定量比较。
AI.result: 该模型能够定量再现从原子级手性结构到包含约10^5个原子的DNA折纸组装金纳米棒的手性光学光谱，跨越量子到经典区域，验证了等离子体手性的统一电动力学起源。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持等离子体手性具有统一的电动力学起源，为连接局部结构特征与手性光学响应提供了理论基础，为针对特定应用的原子级精确手性等离子体纳米结构理性设计铺平了道路。

title: Towards twisted, topological, and quantum graphene plasmonics
summary: In this article, we analyze the quantum and topological properties of graphene-based plasmonic systems. We consider the following plasmonic materials: single-layer graphene, twisted bilayer graphene, and other graphene stackings, as well as the following architectures: graphene-based gratings, grids, chains of graphene disks, and the kagomé lattice.

AI.tldr: 分析石墨烯基等离子体系统的量子与拓扑特性，涵盖不同石墨烯材料和结构
AI.motivation: 探索石墨烯基等离子体系统的量子与拓扑性质，为新型光电子器件和量子技术提供理论基础
AI.method: 分析多种石墨烯材料（单层石墨烯、扭曲双层石墨烯等）和不同结构（光栅、网格、石墨烯盘链、Kagomé晶格）的等离子体特性
AI.result: 系统研究了不同石墨烯材料和结构的量子与拓扑性质，揭示了石墨烯等离子体系统的丰富物理行为
AI.conclusion: 石墨烯基等离子体系统展现出丰富的量子与拓扑特性，为设计新型量子器件和拓扑光子学应用提供了重要平台

title: Interstitial-Electron Altermagnetism in Two Dimensions
summary: Altermagnetism has so far been associated with compensated magnetic moments carried by atoms. Here we introduce Stoner instability induced interstitial-electron altermagnetism, a distinct mechanism in which altermagnetic order is carried instead by interstitial anionic electrons in electrides. We show that, owing to the quasi-nucleus-free nature of interstitial electrons, the Stoner instability in electrides hosting two interstitial electrons can naturally stabilize an altermagnetic state rather than the conventional ferromagnetic one. This mechanism leads to a practical design principle for two-dimensional materials, from which we identify monolayers Zr2N and Ti2N as representative candidates. The strong sensitivity of interstitial electrons to cavity size enables efficient strain control of the altermagnetic order and a pronounced piezo-altermagnetic effect. Moreover, we investigate the evolution of the magnetism in Zr2N under ultrafast laser excitation, which exhibits dynamics distinct from those in all previously reported magnetic materials where magnetism is carried by real atoms. Our work not only offers a novel pathway to realize altermagnetism but also reveals an efficient non-magnetic route for its control.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型的交替磁性机制：由间隙电子（而非原子磁矩）承载的斯通纳不稳定性诱导的间隙电子交替磁性
AI.motivation: 传统交替磁性依赖于原子磁矩的补偿排列，本文旨在探索由间隙电子承载的新型交替磁性机制，为二维材料设计提供新途径
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明，在含有两个间隙电子的电子化合物中，由于间隙电子的准无核特性，斯通纳不稳定性会自然稳定交替磁态而非传统铁磁态；提出二维材料设计原则，并以Zr2N和Ti2N单层为代表候选材料；研究应变控制和超快激光激发下的磁性演化
AI.result: 成功识别出Zr2N和Ti2N单层作为代表性候选材料；间隙电子对空腔尺寸的强敏感性实现了高效的应变控制交替磁序和显著的压电交替磁效应；超快激光激发下的磁性演化显示出与以往原子承载磁性材料不同的独特动力学行为
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅提供了实现交替磁性的新途径，还揭示了通过非磁性方式高效控制交替磁性的方法，为二维磁性材料设计和调控开辟了新方向

title: Contrasting Spin Excitations in Octahedral and Square-Planar n=8 Ruddlesden-Popper Nickelates
summary: The discovery of superconductivity in reduced square-planar nickelates marked a major advance in identifying structural and electronic analogs to the high-$T_c$ cuprates. The more recent observation of superconductivity in parent Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) octahedral nickelates with a clear difference in electron count with respect to cuprates raises new questions about the nature of superconductivity across these related but distinct nickelate families. Here, we use Ni $L_3$-edge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS) to probe the low-energy excitations in a representative compound of both families: the parent octahedral $n=8$ RP phase Nd$_9$Ni$_8$O$_{25}$ (p-RP), which is non-superconducting, and its reduced square-planar counterpart Nd$_9$Ni$_8$O$_{18}$ (r-RP), which exhibits superconducting correlations with a $T_c \approx 5$ K. The $n=8$ p-RP develops a spin-density-wave (SDW) ground state with ordering wave vector $q_{\mathrm{SDW}} = (1/4,\, 1/4)$, analogous to the bilayer RP, while the $n=8$ r-RP shows an elastic peak at $q^\star = (1/3,\, 0)$. Polarimetric RIXS shows that the p-RP exhibits low-energy spectra dominated by weakly dispersive paramagnons along the 0$\rightarrowπ$ and $π\!\rightarrow\! π$ directions, whereas the r-RP with superconducting correlations displays dispersionless magnetic excitations. Our results comprehensively map out the spin excitations and reveal fundamental differences in the ground state between these two distinct structural families.

AI.tldr: 使用RIXS研究两种镍酸盐家族的低能激发：非超导的八面体RP相Nd₉Ni₈O₂₅和具有超导相关性的还原平面相Nd₉Ni₈O₁₈，揭示两者自旋激发和基态的根本差异。
AI.motivation: 理解不同结构镍酸盐家族中超导性的本质差异，特别是八面体RP镍酸盐与还原平面镍酸盐在电子计数和超导行为上的区别。
AI.method: 使用Ni L₃边共振非弹性X射线散射(RIXS)技术，结合极化RIXS，研究两种代表性化合物的低能激发：非超导的八面体n=8 RP相Nd₉Ni₈O₂₅和具有超导相关性的还原平面相Nd₉Ni₈O₁₈。
AI.result: 八面体RP相形成自旋密度波基态，具有有序波矢q_SDW=(1/4,1/4)，显示弱色散顺磁子；而还原平面相在q*=(1/3,0)处出现弹性峰，显示无色散磁激发。两者自旋激发谱存在根本差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究全面绘制了两种镍酸盐家族的自旋激发谱，揭示了它们在基态性质上的根本差异，为理解不同结构镍酸盐中超导性的起源提供了重要线索。

title: Non-equilibrium Green's function formalism for radiative heat transfer
summary: Radiative heat transfer (RHT) at the nanoscale can vastly exceed the far-field blackbody limit due to the tunneling of evanescent waves, a phenomenon traditionally described by fluctuational electrodynamics (FE). While FE has been exceptionally successful for systems in local thermal equilibrium, its foundational assumptions break down in the growing number of scenarios involving genuine non-equilibrium conditions, such as in active devices or driven materials. This review introduces the non-equilibrium Green's function (NEGF) formalism as a powerful and versatile framework to study RHT beyond these classical limits. Rooted in quantum many-body theory, NEGF provides a unified language to describe energy transport by photons, electrons, and phonons on an equal footing. We first outline the theoretical foundations of the NEGF approach for RHT, demonstrating how it recovers the canonical results of FE in the local equilibrium limit. We then survey recent breakthroughs enabled by NEGF, including: (i) providing a quantum-accurate description of equilibrium RHT that naturally incorporates non-local and finite-size effects, resolving unphysical divergences predicted by local models; (ii) unifying heat transfer channels to reveal the non-additive synergy between radiation, electron tunneling, and phonon conduction at sub-nanometer gaps; (iii) enabling the quantum design of materials and metamaterials with tailored thermal properties through band structure and topological engineering; and (iv) describing active control of heat flow in driven systems, which allows for phenomena like isothermal heat transfer and pumping heat against a temperature gradient.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述介绍了非平衡格林函数（NEGF）形式作为研究纳米尺度辐射传热（RHT）的强大框架，超越了传统涨落电动力学（FE）在非平衡条件下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统涨落电动力学（FE）在描述局部热平衡系统时非常成功，但其基本假设在涉及真正非平衡条件（如主动器件或驱动材料）的场景中失效。需要一种能够超越经典极限的统一框架来研究辐射传热。
AI.method: 采用基于量子多体理论的非平衡格林函数（NEGF）形式，为光子、电子和声子的能量传输提供统一描述框架。该方法在局部平衡极限下可恢复FE的经典结果。
AI.result: NEGF实现了多项突破：1）提供量子精确的平衡RHT描述，解决局部模型预测的非物理发散；2）统一传热通道，揭示亚纳米间隙中辐射、电子隧穿和声子传导的非加性协同效应；3）通过能带结构和拓扑工程实现材料热性能的量子设计；4）描述驱动系统中的主动热流控制。
AI.conclusion: NEGF形式为研究超越经典极限的辐射传热提供了强大而通用的框架，能够处理非平衡条件、统一不同传热机制，并实现热性能的量子设计和主动控制。

title: Decoupling dislocation multiplication and velocity effects in metals at extreme strain rates
summary: The dynamic behavior of metals is governed by collective dislocation motion and interactions that strongly depend on the applied strain rate. Metals exhibit weak strain rate sensitivity (SRS) below a certain threshold, followed by a distinct SRS upturn at higher loading rates. While this upturn is typically attributed to increased glide resistance at high dislocation velocity due to mechanisms such as phonon drag, the role of strain-rate-dependent dislocation multiplication and microstructural evolution under these extreme conditions remains elusive. Here, we decouple these two strengthening effects and show that, while dislocation velocity primarily governs the SRS upturn, the hardening due to microstructure evolution depends strongly on the initial dislocation density. Our investigation of hardness evolution across ten decades of strain rates in a quenched and tempered martensitic low-carbon steel (LCS) using laser-induced projectile impact tests (LIPIT) and nanoindentation reveals SRS upturn around 10^7 1/s. By performing in situ re-indentation of the formed craters, we probe the contribution of dislocations generated during initial deformation at different strain rates. We show that while dislocation multiplication plays a negligible role in fine-grained LCS with high dislocation density, a pronounced dislocation multiplication contributes to the hardness increase in pure iron with lower initial dislocation density. Our results show that, depending on the initial microstructure of metals, dislocation multiplication significantly governs high-strain-rate plasticity, in addition to dislocation velocity effects.

AI.tldr: 研究通过激光诱导弹丸冲击测试和纳米压痕，在淬火回火马氏体低碳钢中揭示了应变率敏感性在约10^7 1/s时的转折，发现位错速度主导SRS转折，而微观结构演化硬化取决于初始位错密度。
AI.motivation: 金属在高应变率下的动态行为受集体位错运动和相互作用控制，但应变率依赖的位错增殖和微观结构演化在极端条件下的作用尚不清楚。需要解耦位错速度和微观结构演化对高应变率塑性的贡献。
AI.method: 使用激光诱导弹丸冲击测试(LIPIT)和纳米压痕，在淬火回火马氏体低碳钢中跨越十个数量级的应变率研究硬度演化。通过原位重新压痕形成的凹坑，探测不同应变率下初始变形产生的位错的贡献。
AI.result: 在约10^7 1/s观察到SRS转折。对于高位错密度的细晶低碳钢，位错增殖作用可忽略；而对于低位错密度的纯铁，显著的位错增殖导致硬度增加。位错速度主导SRS转折，但微观结构演化硬化强烈依赖初始位错密度。
AI.conclusion: 除了位错速度效应外，位错增殖显著控制金属的高应变率塑性，具体取决于初始微观结构。初始位错密度低的金属中位错增殖起重要作用，而高位错密度材料中微观结构演化贡献较小。

title: Computational Insights into PEMFC Durability: Degradation Mechanisms, Interfacial Chemistry, and the Emerging Role of Machine Learning Potentials
comment: A literature review to be submitted to advance chemical reviews. This is the version before submission
summary: Proton exchange membrane fuel cells (PEMFCs) are a promising clean energy technology, offering high efficiency and near-zero operational emissions for stationery and automotive applications. However, their widespread adoption remains limited by insufficient durability, driven by the degradation of the catalyst layer and proton exchange membrane under realistic operating conditions. While the macroscopic consequences of degradation are well established experimentally, the atomistic and molecular mechanisms that initiate and propagate failure remain incompletely understood. This review synthesizes recent advances in computational modelling, spanning density functional theory, molecular dynamics, and emerging machine learning potentials, to examine how chemical, mechanical, electrochemical, and contamination driven degradation mechanisms operate across multiple length and time scales. Key topics include radical-induced membrane degradation, platinum dissolution and carbon support corrosion, mechanical fatigue under electrical and hygrothermal cycling, and the impact of ionic and gaseous contaminants. A central finding is that these degradation pathways are not independent, but form strongly coupled feedback loops that no existing computational framework has been designed to capture this coupling simultaneously. Future directions are proposed, with emphasis on multiscale modelling frameworks and the application of machine learning interatomic potentials to the electrified interface.

AI.tldr: 该综述论文总结了质子交换膜燃料电池中催化剂层和质子交换膜降解的多尺度计算建模研究，重点关注化学、机械、电化学和污染驱动的降解机制及其耦合反馈效应。
AI.motivation: 质子交换膜燃料电池虽然具有高效和近零排放的优点，但其广泛应用受到耐久性不足的限制。虽然宏观降解现象已有实验研究，但原子和分子层面的降解机制仍不完全清楚，需要多尺度计算建模来深入理解。
AI.method: 采用计算建模方法，包括密度泛函理论、分子动力学和新兴的机器学习势能，从多尺度角度研究化学、机械、电化学和污染驱动的降解机制。
AI.result: 研究发现降解途径不是独立的，而是形成强烈耦合的反馈循环，包括自由基诱导的膜降解、铂溶解和碳载体腐蚀、电和湿热循环下的机械疲劳、以及离子和气态污染物的影响。
AI.conclusion: 现有计算框架未能同时捕捉这些耦合效应，未来研究方向应聚焦于多尺度建模框架和机器学习原子间势在带电界面中的应用。

title: On the interpretation of Hahn echo measurements in electron spin resonance scanning tunneling microscopy
summary: Electron spin resonance scanning tunneling microscopy (ESR-STM) has become a powerful tool for probing spin dynamics and coherence of individual atoms and molecules on surfaces. In this work, we perform Rabi oscillation and Hahn echo pulse protocols on individual iron phthalocyanine (FePc) molecules on MgO/Ag(001) using ESR-STM. While Hahn echo protocols are widely used to extract spin coherence times, we show that in ESR-STM they are particularly susceptible to misinterpretation due to tunneling electrons generated by the applied radio-frequency (RF) voltage. The RF voltage not only drives the spin, but simultaneously probes and relaxes it, which consequently leads to an exponential decay that reflects spin relaxation rather than intrinsic phase coherence. We moreover show that varying both delay times in the refocusing pulse sequence is a reliable way to ensure a coherent nature of the echo signal. The extracted decay for the latter protocol suggests that T2 is approximately 30 ns and is thus closer to the decoherence time observed in Rabi oscillation measurements. This is significantly shorter than values reported in previous echo measurements. Our findings underscore the need for caution in interpreting T2 times from Hahn echo and Carr-Purcell protocols in ESR-STM and provide practical criteria for distinguishing true spin echoes from tunneling-induced relaxometry signals.

AI.tldr: ESR-STM中Hahn echo测量易受RF电压产生的隧穿电子干扰，导致测得的T2时间反映的是自旋弛豫而非本征相位相干性。通过改变重聚焦脉冲序列中的延迟时间可区分真实自旋回波与隧穿诱导弛豫信号。
AI.motivation: ESR-STM已成为探测表面单个原子和分子自旋动力学和相干性的有力工具，但Hahn echo协议在ESR-STM中特别容易因RF电压产生的隧穿电子而误判，需要建立可靠的区分方法。
AI.method: 在MgO/Ag(001)上的单个铁酞菁分子上使用ESR-STM进行Rabi振荡和Hahn echo脉冲协议，通过改变重聚焦脉冲序列中的两个延迟时间来验证回波信号的相干性质。
AI.result: Hahn echo协议测得的指数衰减反映的是自旋弛豫而非本征相位相干性，真实T2约为30纳秒，远小于先前回波测量报告的值，且与Rabi振荡测量的退相干时间更接近。
AI.conclusion: 在ESR-STM中解释Hahn echo和Carr-Purcell协议的T2时间需要谨慎，提供了区分真实自旋回波与隧穿诱导弛豫信号的实用标准。

title: Towards a unified first-principles-based description of VO$_2$ using DFT+DMFT with bond-centered orbitals
summary: We present a combined density-functional theory and dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT) study of the full structural phase space of rutile-based vanadium dioxide (VO$_2$), including also the less studied M2 and T phases, using an unconventional bond-centered orbital basis. The use of bond-centered orbitals allows us to treat all main phases of VO$_2$, and the structural transitions between them, using one consistent approach with moderate computational cost and without pre-pattering of the structure into dimerized and undimerized V--V pairs. We obtain two distinct insulating states on the two different types of vanadium chains in the M2 phase, a singlet-insulator on the dimerized chains and a Mott-insulator on the zigzag-distorted chains, which, however, are strongly coupled in the M2 phase and thus the metal-insulator transition always occurs concomitantly for both types of sites. We also demonstrate that the M2 phase corresponds to a local energy minimum in the structural phase space of VO$_2$, the stability of which, apart from the internal structural distortion, depends crucially on the unit cell strain relative to the undistorted rutile phase. Our calculations further indicate that the symmetry-distinct triclinic T phase corresponds electronically to either an M1 or an M2-type insulator with an abrupt transition as a function of distortion. Finally, we disentangle the effect of the dimerization and zigzag distortions by constructing hypothetical structures that contain only one site type, finding that the zigzag distortion strongly favors emergence of the Mott-insulating state, both as function of distortion and on-site interaction.

AI.tldr: 使用键中心轨道基的DFT+DMFT方法研究VO₂所有主要相的结构相空间，揭示M2相中两种不同绝缘态及其耦合机制
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以一致处理VO₂所有主要相的结构转变，需要开发新方法以统一研究不同相（包括M2和T相）的电子结构和金属-绝缘体转变机制
AI.method: 采用键中心轨道基的密度泛函理论+动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）方法，避免对结构进行预图案化，以中等计算成本一致处理所有相
AI.result: 发现M2相中两种不同钒链上存在不同绝缘态：二聚化链上的单重态绝缘体和锯齿形扭曲链上的莫特绝缘体，两者在M2相中强耦合；M2相是结构相空间中的局域能量极小点；T相电子上对应M1或M2型绝缘体
AI.conclusion: 键中心轨道基的DFT+DMFT方法能一致研究VO₂所有主要相，揭示M2相中两种绝缘态的耦合机制，锯齿形扭曲对莫特绝缘态的形成起关键作用

title: Compositional Complexity-Induced Ultralow Friction in Medium-Entropy MXenes
summary: Two-dimensional MXenes are promising solid lubricants, but the roles of compositional complexity and surface chemistry in governing interfacial friction remain unclear. Here, we systematically investigate the adhesion and friction behaviors of medium-entropy (ME) MXenes, TiVNbMoC3 and TiVCrMoC3, and compare them with conventional titanium carbide MXenes, Ti2C and Ti3C2, using a SiO2 colloidal atomic force microscopy probe. Thermal annealing at 200 C converts OH surface terminations to O terminations, leading to pronounced reductions in adhesion energy and friction force across all MXenes studied. ME MXenes exhibit larger adhesion reductions because of their higher initial OH contents and more extensive OH-to-O conversion. In addition, their intrinsically higher out-of-plane bending stiffness suppresses energy dissipation during sliding, enabling ultralow friction. Notably, superlubricity is achieved in ME MXenes, with annealed TiVCrMoC3 exhibiting a coefficient of friction as low as 0.0022, outperforming graphene, MoSe2, and other MXenes evaluated using the same experimental approach. These findings identify compositional complexity as a powerful strategy for engineering MXenes with exceptional tribological performance and establish ME MXenes as a new class of solid lubricants.

AI.tldr: 中等熵MXenes通过表面化学调控实现超低摩擦，TiVCrMoC3经退火后摩擦系数低至0.0022，优于石墨烯和传统MXenes
AI.motivation: 二维MXenes作为固体润滑剂具有潜力，但其成分复杂性和表面化学对界面摩擦的影响机制尚不明确，需要系统研究
AI.method: 使用SiO2胶体原子力显微镜探针系统研究中等熵MXenes（TiVNbMoC3和TiVCrMoC3）与传统钛碳化物MXenes（Ti2C和Ti3C2）的粘附和摩擦行为；通过200°C热退火将表面OH终止基团转化为O终止基团
AI.result: 热退火显著降低了所有MXenes的粘附能和摩擦力；中等熵MXenes由于初始OH含量更高且转化更充分，粘附降低更明显；其固有的更高面外弯曲刚度抑制了滑动过程中的能量耗散，实现了超低摩擦；退火后的TiVCrMoC3摩擦系数低至0.0022，优于石墨烯、MoSe2和其他MXenes
AI.conclusion: 成分复杂性是设计具有优异摩擦学性能MXenes的有效策略，中等熵MXenes成为一类新型固体润滑剂，实现了超润滑性

title: The Unreconstructed α-Al$_{2}$O$_{3}$(0001) Surface is Inhomogeneous and Rough
summary: Alumina (Al$_{2}$O$_{3}$) is a key material for thin-film growth and heterogeneous catalysis, where the atomic surface structure critically impacts performance. Using noncontact atomic force microscopy (nc-AFM) combined with density functional theory (DFT) calculations, we challenge the common assumption that the unreconstructed $α$-Al$_{2}$O$_{3}$(0001) surface is atomically flat and uniformly Al-terminated. This widely accepted bulk termination satisfies polarity compensation requirements but results in highly undercoordinated surface Al cations at the surface. Despite substantial inward relaxation of these Al cations, we find that the (1 ${\times}$ 1) surface remains inherently metastable, relative to the thermodynamically stable $(\sqrt{31} \times \sqrt{31})R\pm9°$ surface reconstruction that forms at high temperatures above 1000 °C. Nc-AFM imaging of the unreconstructed surface reveals a rough and disordered morphology, with only nanometer-scale regions exhibiting the ordered Al-terminated (1 $\times$ 1) structure. Our results show that the unreconstructed Al$_{2}$O$_{3}$(0001) surface is intrinsically inhomogeneous, reconciling conflicting experimental observations and challenging the validity of commonly used atomistic models.

AI.tldr: 通过非接触原子力显微镜和DFT计算，研究发现α-Al₂O₃(0001)表面并非传统认为的原子级平坦均匀Al终止，而是粗糙无序的，仅在纳米尺度区域呈现有序结构，挑战了常用的原子模型假设。
AI.motivation: 氧化铝是薄膜生长和异相催化的关键材料，其原子表面结构对性能至关重要。传统假设认为未重构的α-Al₂O₃(0001)表面是原子级平坦且均匀Al终止的，但这一假设与一些实验观察存在矛盾。
AI.method: 采用非接触原子力显微镜(nc-AFM)结合密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，对α-Al₂O₃(0001)表面进行原子尺度表征和理论分析。
AI.result: 未重构表面呈现粗糙无序的形貌，仅在纳米尺度区域显示有序的Al终止(1×1)结构。该表面相对于高温下形成的(√31×√31)R±9°重构表面是亚稳态的。
AI.conclusion: 未重构的Al₂O₃(0001)表面本质上是非均匀的，这调和了相互矛盾的实验观察结果，并挑战了常用原子模型的有效性。

title: Euler band topology and multiple hinge modes in three-dimensional insulators
summary: In two-dimensional systems with space-time inversion symmetry, such as $C_{2z}T$, the reality condition on wave functions gives rise to real band topology characterized by the Euler class, a $\mathbb{Z}$-valued topological invariant for a pair of real bands in the Brillouin zone. In this paper, we study three-dimensional $C_{2z}T$-symmetric insulators characterized by $\bar{e}_2$, defined as the difference in the Euler classes between two $C_{2z}T$-invariant planes in the three-dimensional Brillouin zone. By deriving effective surface Hamiltonians from generic low-energy continuum Hamiltonians characterized by the topological invariant $\bar{e}_2$, we reveal that multiple gapless boundary states exist at the domain walls of the surface mass, which give rise to the multiple chiral hinge modes. We also show that three-dimensional insulators characterized by $\bar{e}_2=N$ support $N$ chiral hinge modes. Notably, due to the constraint of two occupied bands in our system, these phases are distinct from stacked Chern insulators composed of $N$ layers. Furthermore, we construct tight-binding models for $\bar{e}_2=2$ and $3$ and numerically demonstrate the emergence of two and three chiral hinge modes, respectively. These results are consistent with those obtained from the surface theory.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究三维C_{2z}T对称绝缘体中由欧拉类差定义的拓扑不变量\bar{e}_2，揭示了其支持多个手性铰链模式，与堆叠陈绝缘体不同。
AI.motivation: 研究具有时空反演对称性（如C_{2z}T）的三维系统中，由欧拉类差定义的新拓扑不变量\bar{e}_2的物理表现，特别是其边界态特征。
AI.method: 1. 从具有拓扑不变量\bar{e}_2的低能连续哈密顿量推导有效表面哈密顿量；2. 分析表面质量畴壁处的多个无隙边界态；3. 构建\bar{e}_2=2和3的紧束缚模型进行数值验证。
AI.result: 1. 发现\bar{e}_2=N的三维绝缘体支持N个手性铰链模式；2. 由于仅有两个占据带，这些相与N层堆叠陈绝缘体不同；3. 数值模拟确认\bar{e}_2=2和3时分别出现2个和3个手性铰链模式。
AI.conclusion: 三维C_{2z}T对称绝缘体中由欧拉类差定义的拓扑不变量\bar{e}_2表征了新的拓扑相，支持多个手性铰链模式，为拓扑绝缘体研究提供了新方向。

title: Cluster glass behavior and magnetocaloric effect in the hexagonal polymorph of disordered Ce$_2$PdGe$_3$
summary: In this work, we study the hexagonal variant of the $\text{Ce}_2\text{PdGe}_3$ system that crystallizes in the $\text{AlB}_2$-type structure (space group $P6/mmm$, $hP3$) and exhibits cluster spin glass type behavior. The physical properties were studied by magnetization, heat capacity and electric resistivity, which showed that $\text{AlB}_2$-type $\text{Ce}_2\text{PdGe}_3$ ($h\text{-Ce}_2\text{PdGe}_3$) can be classified as a cluster glass material with the freezing temperature $T_f = 3.44 \text{ K}$ in contrast to the behavior of the previously described tetragonal variant, which shows a double antiferromagnetic transition at $T_{N1} = 11 \text{ K}$ and $T_{N2} = 2.3 \text{ K}$. The X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy measurements reveal that the $\text{Ce } 4f$ states are well localized. In addition, we examine the magnetocaloric effect in this compound. The maximum values of magnetocaloric parameters appear in the vicinity of $7\text{--}9 \text{ K}$. For a magnetic field change of $50 \text{ kOe}$, the value of the change in magnetic entropy is $2.6(1) \text{ J kg}^{-1} \text{ K}^{-1}$ and the adiabatic temperature change is $\sim 8 \text{ K}$.

AI.tldr: 研究六方AlB2型Ce₂PdGe₃的物理性质，发现其表现出团簇自旋玻璃行为，与先前报道的四方变体的双反铁磁转变不同
AI.motivation: 研究Ce₂PdGe₃系统的六方变体（AlB2型结构）的物理性质，特别是与已知的四方变体（显示双反铁磁转变）进行对比，探索其独特的团簇自旋玻璃行为
AI.method: 通过磁化、热容和电阻率测量研究物理性质，使用X射线光电子能谱分析Ce 4f电子态局域化程度，并考察磁热效应
AI.result: 六方Ce₂PdGe₃表现为团簇玻璃材料，冻结温度T_f=3.44K；XPS显示Ce 4f态高度局域化；磁热效应在7-9K附近最大，50kOe磁场变化下磁熵变为2.6(1) J·kg⁻¹·K⁻¹，绝热温度变化约8K
AI.conclusion: 六方AlB2型Ce₂PdGe₃是团簇自旋玻璃材料，与四方变体的双反铁磁行为形成鲜明对比，并表现出显著的磁热效应

title: Hunting Structural Demons in Digital Reticular Chemistry
summary: Digital reticular chemistry relies on accurate crystal structures to power computational screening, data-driven discovery, and structure-property analysis, yet recent studies reveal that more than half of the top-performing candidates in major computational screening campaigns are chemically invalid. In experimental MOF databases, structural errors arise when disordered or incomplete structural models are incorrectly converted into fully specified simulation inputs. In hypothetical MOF database, structures are complete by construction but may encode chemically implausible oxidation states, coordination environments, or charge distributions. We term these erroneous structural models "structural demons." This mini-review asks three questions: where these errors enter, how we find them, and how we prevent them. On the prevention side, the key steps are keeping diffraction data and synthesis details together from the start, using consistent curation when structures enter a database, and filtering topology choices before structure generation. Connecting these steps can keep many bad structures out of downstream databases and reduce the need to fix them later.

AI.tldr: 该论文回顾了数字网状化学中晶体结构错误问题，指出超过一半的高性能候选结构存在化学无效性，并提出预防和检测"结构恶魔"的方法。
AI.motivation: 数字网状化学依赖准确的晶体结构进行计算筛选、数据驱动发现和结构-性质分析，但研究发现超过一半的高性能候选结构存在化学无效性。这些错误结构被称为"结构恶魔"，会严重影响研究可靠性。
AI.method: 通过分析实验MOF数据库和假设MOF数据库中的错误来源，提出三方面解决方案：1) 从源头保持衍射数据和合成细节的完整性；2) 使用一致的策展流程；3) 在结构生成前过滤拓扑选择。
AI.result: 识别出结构错误主要来源：实验MOF数据库中无序或不完整结构模型的错误转换，以及假设MOF数据库中化学上不可信的氧化态、配位环境或电荷分布。
AI.conclusion: 通过连接数据采集、策展和结构生成的关键步骤，可以防止大量错误结构进入下游数据库，减少后期修复需求，提高数字网状化学研究的可靠性。

title: Sign control of photocurrents by spin-group-symmetry breaking in altermagnetic insulators
summary: Controlling physical responses through symmetry breaking is a central paradigm in quantum materials, enabling novel functionalities. Here we determine the effects of spin-group-symmetry breaking on nonlinear optical responses of collinear altermagnetic insulators. Using shear strain as an example, we show that the direction of symmetry-breaking induced components of charge and spin photocurrents are locked to the sign of the strain. In the absence of spin-orbit coupling, this effect is intuitively captured by the spin-gap asymmetry--an imbalance between spin-up and spin-down direct band gaps which couples trilinearly with the Néel order and the strain. We demonstrate this mechanism with density functional theory calculations on the recently proposed altermagnet CuWP$_2$S$_6$. Having symmetry-guided control of both charge and spin photocurrents allows, vice versa, to reveal and investigate altermagnetism in insulating materials by exploration of their optical responses.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自旋群对称性破缺对共线反铁磁绝缘体非线性光学响应的影响，发现应变方向可以锁定电荷和自旋光电流的方向，并提出了通过光学响应探测反铁磁性的方法。
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过对称性破缺控制量子材料的物理响应，特别是探索自旋群对称性破缺对反铁磁绝缘体非线性光学响应的影响，以实现对电荷和自旋光电流的对称性引导控制。
AI.method: 使用剪切应变作为对称性破缺的例子，分析应变方向如何锁定电荷和自旋光电流分量的方向。在没有自旋轨道耦合的情况下，通过自旋能隙不对称性（自旋向上和向下直接带隙的不平衡）来理解这一效应。使用密度泛函理论计算对CuWP₂S₆反铁磁体进行验证。
AI.result: 应变方向能够锁定对称性破缺诱导的电荷和自旋光电流分量的方向。自旋能隙不对称性与尼尔序和应变三线性耦合，直观地解释了这一效应。在CuWP₂S₆反铁磁体中的计算验证了这一机制。
AI.conclusion: 通过对称性引导控制电荷和自旋光电流，可以反过来通过探索材料的光学响应来揭示和研究绝缘体中的反铁磁性，为反铁磁材料的探测和研究提供了新方法。

title: Refining hydrogen positions in α-FeOOH through combined neutron diffraction and computational techniques
summary: The hydrogen positions and magnetic structure of goethite $α$-FeOOH, a key component of iron rust, were examined through neutron diffraction. All symmetry-allowed magnetic structures under the space group $Pnma$ with the magnetic wavevector $\vec{q}_{\rm m} = (0, 0, 0)$ r.l.u. were analysed using irreducible representation and magnetic space group approaches. The magnetic moments aligned along the $b$-axis form antiferromagnetic spin arrangements, as reproduced by first-principles calculations. Accurately determining the hydrogen positions is crucial for understanding the mechanism of catalytic reduction of CO$_2$ in $α$-FeOOH. These positions were precisely identified through diffraction and calculations, highlighting the effectiveness of using both methods for undeuterated compounds.

AI.tldr: 通过中子衍射研究针铁矿α-FeOOH的氢原子位置和磁结构，结合第一性原理计算确定其反铁磁排列和氢原子精确位置
AI.motivation: 针铁矿α-FeOOH是铁锈的关键成分，准确确定其氢原子位置对于理解其在CO₂催化还原中的机制至关重要，同时需要阐明其磁结构特性
AI.method: 采用中子衍射技术，结合不可约表示和磁空间群方法分析Pnma空间群下所有对称性允许的磁结构，同时进行第一性原理计算验证
AI.result: 确定磁矩沿b轴排列形成反铁磁自旋构型，精确确定了氢原子位置，证明了衍射和计算相结合方法对未氘代化合物的有效性
AI.conclusion: 通过中子衍射和第一性原理计算的结合，成功确定了针铁矿α-FeOOH的氢原子位置和磁结构，为理解其在CO₂催化还原中的机制提供了关键结构信息

title: Room-temperature antiferromagnetic resonance in NaMnAs
summary: We report on antiferromagnetic resonance experiments in bulk tetragonal NaMnAs -- a room-temperature antiferromagnetic semiconductor. Our results corroborate previous ab initio studies, which propose that NaMnAs is an easy-axis antiferromagnet with the Néel vector oriented along the tetragonal axis. At $ B = 0 $, we find a single antiferromagnetic resonance line at 7 meV and associate it with a doubly degenerate ($ k = 0 $) magnon mode. Its energy softens considerably with increasing $ T $, but remains clearly visible in the data up to room temperature. From the experimental data, we estimate the single-ion anisotropy of the Mn ions in NaMnAs to be $ D \approx 0.2 $ meV, a value that is relatively large compared to other manganese-based antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: NaMnAs是一种室温反铁磁半导体，通过反铁磁共振实验确认其为易轴反铁磁体，Néel矢量沿四方轴方向，在零磁场下观测到7 meV共振线，对应双重简并磁振子模式，单离子各向异性D≈0.2 meV
AI.motivation: 研究NaMnAs这种室温反铁磁半导体的磁性质，验证先前ab initio计算预测的易轴反铁磁结构，并测量其磁各向异性参数
AI.method: 采用反铁磁共振实验技术，在零磁场下测量NaMnAs块体材料的共振谱，分析共振线随温度的变化，通过实验数据估算单离子各向异性参数
AI.result: 实验证实NaMnAs为易轴反铁磁体，Néel矢量沿四方轴方向；在零磁场下观测到7 meV的单一反铁磁共振线，对应双重简并磁振子模式；共振能量随温度升高显著软化，但在室温下仍清晰可见；估算得到Mn离子的单离子各向异性D≈0.2 meV
AI.conclusion: NaMnAs是一种具有相对较大单离子各向异性的室温易轴反铁磁半导体，其磁性质与理论预测一致，为基于锰的反铁磁材料研究提供了重要参考

title: Anomalous Nonlinear Magnetoconductivity in van der Waals Magnet CrSBr
summary: Nonlinear magnetoconductivity (NLMC) is a nonreciprocal transport response arising in non-centrosymmetric materials. However, this ordinary NLMC signal vanishes at zero magnetic field, limiting its potential for applications. Here, we report the observation of an anomalous NLMC controlled by internal order parameters such as the magnetization or Néel vectors. We achieve this response by breaking both inversion and time-reversal symmetry in artificial van der Waals heterostructures based on the magnetic CrSBr and insulating hBN. The nonreciprocal signal can be tuned between two different states in ferromagnetic monolayer CrSBr and among four different states in antiferromagnetic bilayer CrSBr, thanks to its metamagnetic transition. Remarkably, this output signal in the ferromagnetic (antiferromagnetic) state of CrSBr is three (one) orders of magnitude higher than those previously measured. A conductivity scaling analysis reveals the Berry connection polarizability as the origin of the anomalous NLMC. Our results pave the way for high-frequency rectifiers with magnetically switchable output polarity as well as for an efficient electrical readout of the magnetic state of antiferromagnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 在CrSBr/hBN范德华异质结中观测到由磁化或奈尔矢量等内部序参量控制的异常非线性磁导响应，信号强度比以往高3个数量级，可用于高频整流器和反铁磁态电学读取。
AI.motivation: 普通非线性磁导信号在零磁场下消失，限制了其应用潜力。需要寻找由内部序参量控制的异常非线性磁导响应，以实现磁可切换输出极性的高频整流器和反铁磁材料的有效电学读取。
AI.method: 通过CrSBr磁性材料和hBN绝缘体构建人工范德华异质结，同时打破反演对称性和时间反演对称性。利用铁磁单层CrSBr和反铁磁双层CrSBr的亚磁转变，调控非互易信号状态。
AI.result: 在铁磁态CrSBr中观测到比以往高3个数量级的异常非线性磁导信号，反铁磁态中高1个数量级。铁磁单层可实现两种状态切换，反铁磁双层可实现四种状态切换。电导率标度分析表明Berry连接极化率是异常非线性磁导的起源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为具有磁可切换输出极性的高频整流器以及反铁磁材料磁态的有效电学读取开辟了新途径，展示了内部序参量控制异常非线性磁导的潜力。

title: Exciton dynamics and high-temperature excitonic superfluidity in S-doped graphyne
summary: S-doped graphyne (S-GY) is a recently synthesized two-dimensional graphyne-based carbon allotrope that provides a promising platform for exciton engineering and coherent many-body phases. Here, we investigate the quasiparticle electronic structure, optical response, and exciton dynamics of monolayer S-GY using the G$_0$W$_0$ approximation and the Bethe--Salpeter equation (BSE). Quasiparticle corrections increase the fundamental band gap from $0.88\,\text{eV}$ (PBE) to $1.95\,\text{eV}$, while slightly reducing the carrier effective masses. The BSE optical response reveals strongly bound excitons, with the lowest bright exciton exhibiting a binding energy of $0.72\,\text{eV}$, as well as a nearly degenerate dark exciton within the thermal energy scale. Analysis of exciton wavefunctions in reciprocal space confirms a hydrogenic Rydberg series with well-defined angular-momentum character, and radiative lifetimes in the nanosecond range at room temperature, comparable to those in transition-metal dichalcogenide monolayers. Finally, we construct the excitonic phase diagram and estimate a crossover density of $\sim6 \times10^{12}~\text{cm}^{-2}$, below which the exciton gas behaves as a dilute Bose system, and the Berezinskii--Kosterlitz--Thouless (BKT) superfluid phase becomes accessible. We estimate a maximum BKT transition temperature of $\sim 143\,\text{K}$ in the freestanding limit for the 1s exciton, indicating that monolayer S-GY may provide favorable conditions for high-temperature excitonic superfluidity in graphyne-based materials.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过GW-BSE方法系统分析了S掺杂石墨烯(S-GY)的准粒子电子结构、光学响应和激子动力学，发现其具有强束缚激子、氢原子里德堡系列特征，并预测了BKT激子超流相变温度可达143K。
AI.motivation: S掺杂石墨烯(S-GY)是一种新合成的二维石墨烯基碳同素异形体，为激子工程和相干多体相提供了有前景的平台。研究旨在系统探索其电子结构、光学性质和激子动力学特性。
AI.method: 采用G0W0近似计算准粒子电子结构，结合Bethe-Salpeter方程(BSE)分析光学响应和激子动力学。通过激子波函数在倒易空间的分析确认氢原子里德堡系列特征，并构建激子相图。
AI.result: 准粒子修正将带隙从0.88eV(PBE)增加到1.95eV；最低亮激子结合能为0.72eV，存在近简并暗激子；激子呈现氢原子里德堡系列特征，室温辐射寿命在纳秒量级；预测BKT超流相变温度可达143K，交叉密度约6×10¹² cm⁻²。
AI.conclusion: 单层S-GY具有强束缚激子和有利的激子动力学特性，为石墨烯基材料中实现高温激子超流提供了有利条件，特别是在自由支撑极限下1s激子的BKT相变温度可达143K。

title: Efficient evaluation of the $k$-space second Chern number in four dimensions
summary: We propose an efficient numerical method to compute the $k$-space second Chern number in four-dimensional (4D) topological systems. Our approach employs an adaptive mesh refinement scheme to evaluate the Brillouin-zone integral, which automatically increases the grid density in regions where the Berry curvature is sharply peaked. We compare our method with the 4D lattice-gauge extension of the Fukui-Hatsugai-Suzuki method and a direct uniform grid integration scheme. Compared with these approaches, our method (i) achieves the same accuracy with substantially fewer diagonalizations, and thus runs faster; (ii) requires minimal memory to execute, enabling calculations for larger systems; and (iii) remains accurate even near topological phase transitions where conventional methods often face challenges. These results demonstrate that the adaptive subdivision strategy is a practical and powerful tool for calculating the $k$-space second Chern number.

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算四维拓扑系统中k空间第二陈数的高效数值方法，采用自适应网格细化方案，在贝里曲率尖锐区域自动增加网格密度，相比传统方法计算更快、内存需求更小、在拓扑相变附近更准确。
AI.motivation: 传统计算四维拓扑系统第二陈数的方法（如4D晶格规范扩展的Fukui-Hatsugai-Suzuki方法和直接均匀网格积分）存在计算效率低、内存需求大、在拓扑相变附近精度不足的问题，需要开发更高效、更稳健的数值方法。
AI.method: 采用自适应网格细化方案评估布里渊区积分，自动在贝里曲率尖锐区域增加网格密度，通过自适应细分策略优化计算资源分配。
AI.result: 相比传统方法：(i) 达到相同精度所需对角化次数显著减少，计算速度更快；(ii) 内存需求最小化，能计算更大系统；(iii) 在拓扑相变附近仍保持高精度，而传统方法常面临挑战。
AI.conclusion: 自适应细分策略是计算k空间第二陈数的实用且强大的工具，为四维拓扑系统的数值研究提供了高效可靠的方法。

title: Modeling key characteristics of high-efficiency gallium arsenide solar cells
summary: The paper proposes a theoretical approach to modeling the key characteristics of highly efficient gallium arsenide-based solar cells (SCs), using a one-dimensional SC model. The following recombination mechanisms are considered in the modeling: radiative recombination, interband Auger recombination, Shockley-Reed-Hall (SRH) recombination, surface recombination, recombination in the space charge region (SCR), and recombination along the perimeter of the structure. A simple empirical formula is proposed to describe the recombination along the perimeter of the SC structure. The GaAs band-gap narrowing effect is also taken into consideration. The main results are obtained under the assumption that the times of Shockley-Reed-Hall recombination and recombination in the SCR are the same. The effect of photon recycling (re-emission and re-absorption) is taken into account in a model similar to the one we used previously to simulate key characteristics of high-efficiency single-crystal silicon SCs. The model additionally uses absorption analysis at different doping levels of gallium arsenide. A good agreement was achieved between the experimental and theoretical dependencies. The results obtained in this work can be used to optimize the characteristics of highly efficient SCs based on direct-band semiconductors, particularly gallium arsenide (GaAs). Keywords: solar cell, high efficiency, modeling, gallium arsenide, recombination mechanisms, external quantum efficiency, parameter optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种理论方法来模拟高效砷化镓太阳能电池的关键特性，使用一维模型考虑多种复合机制，包括辐射复合、俄歇复合、SRH复合、表面复合、空间电荷区复合和边缘复合，并考虑了光子循环效应和带隙变窄效应。
AI.motivation: 为了优化基于直接带隙半导体（特别是砷化镓）的高效太阳能电池特性，需要建立一个能够准确描述各种复合机制的理论模型，以更好地理解和预测电池性能。
AI.method: 采用一维太阳能电池模型，考虑辐射复合、俄歇复合、SRH复合、表面复合、空间电荷区复合和边缘复合等多种复合机制，提出简单的经验公式描述边缘复合，考虑带隙变窄效应和光子循环效应，并使用不同掺杂水平的砷化镓吸收分析。
AI.result: 在假设SRH复合时间和空间电荷区复合时间相同的条件下获得主要结果，实验与理论依赖关系取得了良好的一致性，模型可用于优化基于直接带隙半导体（特别是砷化镓）的高效太阳能电池特性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的理论模型能够有效模拟高效砷化镓太阳能电池的关键特性，考虑多种复合机制和光子循环效应，为优化直接带隙半导体太阳能电池提供了有价值的工具。

title: Electron- and Lattice-Temperature Dependence of the Optical Response of Gold Nanoparticles
summary: Transient absorption spectroscopy is routinely used to study the electron dynamics in plasmonic gold nanoparticles. Typically, the transient absorption bleach is analyzed as measure for the electron temperature. However, the implicitly assumed linear dependence between bleach intensity and temperature has not been systematically studied.
